policies.refund: No refunds after 7 days of purchase.
policies.support: 24/7 support is available only on the Pro plan. Basic plan users have email support only.
policies.trial: A 7-day free trial is available for the Pro plan with no credit card required.

product.name: AutoStream
product.description: AutoStream is a SaaS platform that provides automated video editing tools for content creators. It helps YouTubers, Instagram creators, and TikTokers edit videos faster using AI.
